hero.description: Invotrack is the all-in-one dashboard to manage your team, track client items, and generate invoices instantly. Data-driven decisions start here.

features.subTitle: Track clients, manage inventory, and generate invoices in a unified dashboard.

role.title: Role Management
role.desc: Assign precise access. Admins control settings, Managers handle stock, Viewers monitor data, and Deliver staff track shipments.

products.title: Products & Services
products.desc: Track inventory items and service offerings for every client. Never lose track of what you sold or what you owe.

invoicing.title: Smart Invoicing
invoicing.desc: Generate professional invoices with one click. Charts and stats track revenue automatically as invoices are paid.

stats.description: Invotrack doesn't just store data; it visualizes it. Get instant insights into best-selling items, client activity, and team performance.

contact.title: Get your business on Invotrack.
contact.description: Ready to organize your team? Create a business, invite admins and managers, and start delivering value to your clients today.

placeholders.message: I want to create a business...

success.title: Message Sent!
success.subtitle: We'll help you setup your business shortly.

footer.tagline: Track, Invoice, Deliver. Built for speed.

about.title: About Invotrack
about.subtitle: Transforming business management through intelligent automation and intuitive design.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description1: At Invotrack, we believe every business—regardless of size—deserves access to enterprise-grade management tools. Our mission is to empower teams with an intuitive, data-driven platform that simplifies complex operations and drives sustainable growth.
mission.description2: We're committed to removing friction from daily workflows, enabling businesses to focus on what they do best: delivering exceptional value to their clients.

reliability.title: Unmatched Reliability
reliability.desc: Enterprise-grade infrastructure with 99.9% uptime guarantee. Your business data is always accessible and secure.

innovation.title: Continuous Innovation
innovation.desc: We evolve constantly with your business. Regular updates, new features, and AI-driven insights keep you ahead of competition.

support.title: Expert Support
support.desc: Dedicated support team available to help. From onboarding to optimization, we're with you every step of the way.

security.title: Bank-Level Security
security.desc: Industry-standard encryption and compliance certifications protect your sensitive business information.

values.title: Our Core Values
values.description: These principles guide everything we do and shape how we serve our customers.

simplicity.title: Simplicity
simplicity.desc: Complex operations made simple. We eliminate unnecessary complexity so you can focus on growing your business.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.desc: Clear pricing, honest communication, and open policies. No hidden fees, no surprises.

growth.title: Growth Mindset
growth.desc: We succeed when you succeed. Your achievements fuel our innovation and commitment to excellence.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introduction: At Invotrack, we take your privacy seriously. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our platform and services.

collection.title: Information We Collect
collection.description1: We collect information you provide directly, including account registration details, business information, payment data, and communication preferences.
collection.description2: We also automatically collect usage data through cookies and analytics to improve your experience. This includes device information, IP address, and interaction patterns.

usage.title: How We Use Your Information
usage.description1: Your information enables us to provide, maintain, and improve our services. We use it to process transactions, communicate with you, and ensure platform security.
usage.description2: We analyze usage patterns to enhance features and identify opportunities to better serve your business needs.

sharing.title: Information Sharing
sharing.description1: We do not sell your personal data. We only share information with trusted partners who help us operate our platform—payment processors, cloud providers, and security vendors.
sharing.description2: These partners are contractually obligated to maintain the confidentiality and security of your information.
list: Legal compliance when required by law

security.title: Security Measures
security.description1: We implement industry-leading security protocols including end-to-end encryption, regular security audits, and multi-factor authentication.
security.description2: While we maintain robust security practices, no system is completely immune to breaches. We're transparent about incidents and respond immediately when they occur.
list: Data encryption at rest and in transit

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.description1: We retain your data for as long as necessary to provide services and comply with legal obligations. When you close your account, we securely delete your data within 30 days, except where required by law.
retention.description2: Backup copies are retained for a limited period to enable recovery in case of emergency.

rights.title: Your Privacy Rights
rights.description1: Depending on your location, you have rights regarding your personal data. You can request access, correction, deletion, or portability of your information.
rights.description2: To exercise these rights, contact our privacy team. We respond to all requests within 30 days.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description1: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please reach out to our privacy team at contact@invotrack.de.
contact.description2: We're committed to working with you to resolve any privacy concerns.

privacy.contactInfo: Questions about your privacy? Contact us at contact@invotrack.de. We respond within 48 hours.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.introduction: These Terms of Use govern your access to and use of Invotrack's platform and services. By accessing our platform, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you don't agree, please don't use our services.

agreement.title: Agreement to Terms
agreement.description1: By creating an account and using Invotrack, you represent that you're at least 18 years old and authorized to enter into this agreement on behalf of your business or organization.
agreement.description2: You're responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activity that occurs under your account.

usage.title: Acceptable Use
usage.description1: You agree to use Invotrack only for lawful purposes and in ways that don't infringe on the rights of others or restrict their use and enjoyment.
usage.description2: Prohibited behavior includes harassment, obscenity, spam, violation of intellectual property rights, and any illegal activity.
list: Don't use the platform for illegal activities
Don't transmit malware or harmful code
Don't impersonate other users or entities

intellectual.title: Intellectual Property Rights
intellectual.description1: Invotrack owns all intellectual property related to the platform, including software, design, content, and trademarks. Your use grants you a limited, non-exclusive license.
intellectual.description2: You retain ownership of your business data and client information. By using our platform, you grant us a license to process this data to provide our services.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.description1: Invotrack is provided 'as is' without warranties. To the fullest extent permitted by law, we're not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.
liability.description2: Our total liability for any claim is limited to the fees you paid in the past 12 months.
list: We're not liable for data loss

termination.title: Termination
termination.description1: You can terminate your account at any time. Invotrack may terminate your account if you violate these terms or engage in prohibited behavior.
termination.description2: Upon termination, your access ends immediately, though you can export your data within 30 days.

modifications.title: Changes to Terms
modifications.description1: We may modify these terms at any time. We'll notify you of significant changes via email at least 30 days in advance.
modifications.description2: Continued use of Invotrack after changes means you accept the updated terms.

governing.title: Governing Law
governing.description1: These terms are governed by the laws of the European Union and specifically German law. Any disputes shall be resolved through arbitration or courts in Germany.
governing.description2: This choice of law doesn't deprive you of any protection under mandatory consumer protection laws.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.description1: For questions about these Terms of Use, please contact our legal team at contact@invotrack.de.
contact.description2: We're here to clarify any terms and address your concerns.

terms.contactInfo: Have questions about our terms? Reach out to contact@invotrack.de. We're happy to help.
